text:
Release rename p5-WWW-Nicovideo-Download to p5-WWW-NicoVideo-Download
for fix directory name mismatch.  'V' is capital.
(mv www/p5-WWW-Nico{v,V}ideo-Download)

- Add PKGNAMEPREFIX.
- Update RUN_DEPENDS.
